mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_DICT_TYPE( ID, DICT_TYPE, DICT_NAME, IS_OPEN, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, SORT_NUM )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dictType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dictName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isOpen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now}, #{sortNum,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

INSERT INTO M_DICT_DATA( ID, DICT_TYPE, DICT_VALUE, DICT_LABEL, SORT_NUM, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dictType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dictValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dictLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_DICT_TYPE SET DICT_TYPE = #{dictType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DICT_NAME = #{dictName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_OPEN = #{isOpen,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=BIGINT} WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE M_DICT_DATA SET DICT_TYPE = #{dictType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DICT_VALUE = #{dictValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DICT_LABEL = #{dictLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=BIGINT} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DICT_TYPE, DICT_NAME, IS_OPEN, STATUS, CASE STATUS WHEN '1' THEN '在用' ELSE '停用' END STATUS_LABEL, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SORT_NUM FROM M_DICT_TYPE
AND (DICT_NAME LIKE #{dictName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (DICT_TYPE LIKE #{dictType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (STATUS LIKE #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT ID, DICT_TYPE, DICT_NAME, IS_OPEN, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SORT_NUM FROM M_DICT_TYPE WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT A.ID, A.DICT_VALUE, A.DICT_LABEL, A.SORT_NUM, A.STATUS, A.REMARK, A.CREATE_BY, A.create_by_name, A.CREATE_TIME, A.SORT_NUM FROM M_DICT_DATA A WHERE A.DICT_TYPE = #{dictType}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M_DICT_DATA A LEFT JOIN M_DICT_TYPE T ON A.DICT_TYPE = T.DICT_TYPE WHERE T.ID = #{id}
SELECT ID, DICT_VALUE, DICT_LABEL, DICT_TYPE, SORT_NUM, STATUS, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME FROM M_DICT_DATA WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, DICT_VALUE, DICT_LABEL, DICT_TYPE, SORT_NUM, STATUS, CASE STATUS WHEN '1' THEN '在用' ELSE '停用' END STATUS_LABEL, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME FROM M_DICT_DATA
AND (DICT_LABEL LIKE #{dictLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (DICT_VALUE LIKE #{dictValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (STATUS LIKE #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (DICT_TYPE = #{dictType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
order by to_number(SORT_NUM)
SELECT A.ID, A.DICT_VALUE, A.DICT_LABEL, A.SORT_NUM, A.STATUS, A.REMARK, A.CREATE_BY, A.create_by_name, A.CREATE_TIME, A.SORT_NUM FROM M_DICT_DATA A WHERE A.DICT_TYPE = #{dictType}
